summary: Frontend testing of Actions dropdown menu in CRM Inspections table. All 7 menu items tested and working correctly: View Details, Live Progress, Edit Date/Time, Edit Location, Edit Vehicle, Reassign Mechanic, Notes & Activity.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 7 Actions dropdown menu items working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Actions dropdown menu in Inspections table fully tested. All menu items open their respective modals/drawers correctly. The dropdown is implemented at lines 1604-1695 in InspectionsPage.jsx with proper data-testid attributes for each menu item.

frontend_tests.details: Three-dot button (MoreHorizontal icon) in Actions column opens dropdown menu
Opens inspection report in new tab at /inspection-report/{id}
Opens Live Inspection Progress modal with progress %, categories, mechanic info, auto-refresh toggle
Opens Change Schedule modal with date and time inputs
Opens Edit Inspection Location modal with address search field
Opens Change Vehicle modal with vehicle number input and Vaahan API search
Opens Reassign Mechanic modal with mechanic dropdown filtered by city
Opens side drawer with Notes, Activity, and SMS Logs tabs
